name: Rhythm Master
short_description: Innovative and cutting-edge music visualization software combines your beloved music with breathtaking visual effects, adding a visual dimension to enhance your music experience.You can also choose to pin and display, allowing you to appreciate the beautiful effects while working.
detailed_description:
Usage

Use any player you like to play music, and the visualization engine will work automatically.

1.Videos & Images instruction


  • Video 1：Random demonstrating effects
  • Video 2：How to make a effect

  • Video 3&4：Displaying and making

2.About Rhythm Master

Rhythm Master is a music visualization software. When you listen to music in any audio/video player, it can automatically analyze the music and generate beautiful effects. The effects can not only be rendered in a window but can also be fixed at top of your desktop in transparent state. So, you can work together with music and gorgeous effects.

3.Rhythm Master Features


  • Support many components，include Image，Particle System，Frame Animation，Music Visualization，Video，Image Cluster...，and every component can change it’s properties.
  • Support more than 50 kind of Music Visualization effects.
  • Support effect editor, you can make your own effect.
  • Support Particle System editor, you can make special Particle System.
  • You can customize the parameters of each Music Visualization component to suit your preferences.

  • Particle System can also follow the rhythm of the music to showcase dynamic visuals.
  • Support video as effect’s background.
  • Support Time and Label components.
  • Support to play local music in your computer，support more formats, such as mp3, flac, ape..
  • Support ProgressBar component.When you are playing music in Rhythm Master，the progress of music will sync to ProgressBar.
  • Support LRC lyric for music.
  • Support 4K+ monitor

Enjoy
